[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0011101 4
2 0101001 3
3 1000010 2
4 0000010 1
5 0000110 2
6 0111001 4
7 0110001 3

01 10 0001001 2
12 21 0001000 1
23 32 0000010 1 match 4
34 43 0000010 1 match 4
45 54 0010000 1
56 65 0110001 3 match 7
67 76 0010001 2 match 0
70 07 0011001 3

02 20 0001010 2
13 31 0000000 a
24 42 0000010 1 match 4
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0010000 1
57 75 0011001 3
60 06 0010001 2 match 0
71 17 0001001 2

03 30 0000010 1 match 4
14 41 0000000 a
25 52 0001000 1
36 63 0000000 a
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 0011001 3
61 16 0100001 2
72 27 0001000 1

04 40 0010110 3
15 51 0101001 3 match 2
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0000000 a
